user.title: gsmnode
user.description: Connect to your gsmnode API Server.

data_description.api_base: For example http://10.2.1.10:8080 — it must be reachable from Home Assistant.
data_description.device_id: Device ID of the phone to send through by default. Leave empty to use the most recently seen one.

reconfigure.title: gsmnode
reconfigure.description: Update where the API Server lives, or the login used to reach it.

reauth_confirm.title: gsmnode
reauth_confirm.description: The API Server rejected the saved credentials for {email}. Enter the password again.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the API Server. Check the URL and that it is reachable.

abort.account_mismatch: Those settings point at a different gateway account. Add it as a new integration instead.

init.title: gsmnode sidebar

data_description.panel_url: Must be reachable from the browser, not from Home Assistant. A page served over http cannot be embedded in a Home Assistant served over https.
data_description.panel_title: The name shown in the sidebar. Give each gateway its own if you have more than one.

error.url_required: A custom overview needs an address.

options.web_app: Web App — the full gateway UI
options.api_panel: API Server panel — status and administration

send_sms.name: Send SMS
send_sms.description: Send an SMS through the gateway.

config_entry_id.name: Gateway
config_entry_id.description: Which gsmnode gateway to send through. Only needed when more than one is configured.

phone_numbers.name: Phone numbers
phone_numbers.description: One or more recipient phone numbers.

device_id.name: Phone
device_id.description: Gateway phone to send from, by its device ID.

sim_number.name: SIM slot
sim_number.description: Which SIM to send on, counting from 0. Leave empty for the phone's default SIM.

schedule_at.name: Send at
schedule_at.description: Hold the message until this time instead of sending it now.

call.name: Place call
call.description: Tell a gateway phone to place an outbound call.

config_entry_id.name: Gateway
config_entry_id.description: Which gsmnode gateway to call through. Only needed when more than one is configured.

device_id.name: Phone
device_id.description: Gateway phone to call from, by its device ID.

no_gateway.message: No gsmnode gateway is set up. Add the integration first.

ambiguous_gateway.message: More than one gsmnode gateway is set up. Say which one to use in the Gateway field.

entry_not_loaded.message: The gsmnode gateway {entry_id} is unknown or not loaded.

auth_failed.message: The API Server rejected the gsmnode credentials: {error}

request_failed.message: The gsmnode API Server did not accept the request: {error}
